step_rationale: TGRLs are atherogenic lipoprotein particles; residual cardiovascular risk driver.
mechanism: Triglyceride-rich lipoproteins contribute to lipid retention and oxidative modification in the subendothelium, driving atherosclerotic plaque initiation and growth.

references.title: Residual Cardiovascular Risk at Low LDL: Remnants, Lipoprotein(a), and Inflammation.
